title: Xcrumbly French Clotted Cream Crumble
description: A buttery and crumbly weeknight dish from Lyon featuring clotted cream, pickled vegetables, and satvik-friendly.
instructions: Preheat your Robata grill to medium-high.
Mix clotted cream and pickled vegetables until combined. Season with a pinch of salt.
Place mixture on preheated grill, pressing gently to form a thin layer.
Sprinkle butter evenly over the top of the mixture and return to grill for 2-3 minutes or until golden brown and bubbly.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving. Enjoy your French Clotted Cream Crumble with its crunchy crust and creamy interior.
Optional: Serve with a side of fruit or berries for a complete meal.
